name: accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor payments/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor payments/month, manual scheduling causes late payments. We automate payment schedules instead of manual tracking and scheduling in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual scheduling of vendor payments leads to late payments.
